item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1510044871338{margin-top: -85px !important;}"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1747592153251{margin-top: 0px !important;}"][rev_slider_vc alias="300-majorca" el_class="revolution"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class="nivel_2"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509920134837{padding-right: 20px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="A High-End Residential
Building" font_container="tag:h2|text_align:left|line_height:100px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][vc_column_text css=""]300 Majorca was the ﬁrst construction by United Developers in Miami, this is a 17 unit apartment building which was completed in 2009, designed by the renowned Coral Gables architectural ﬁrm Bellin & Pratt. The building has a mix of two town houses and 15 two-bedroom/two-bathroom apartments. Building amenities include under-cover parking, a ﬁtness center, courtyard fountains, lush landscaping, and an outdoor barbecue terrace on the 4th ﬂoor. The building was sold to a Family Ofﬁce, fully rented, in 2016.

[/vc_column_text][ultimate_spacer height="20" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509844650957{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-top: 75px !important;padding-right: 75px !important;padding-bottom: 75px !important;padding-left: 75px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}" el_class="revolution-sup"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="300 Majorca" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:48|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:57px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="100" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="TYPE OF ASSET: Multi-Family Boutique Building.

item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1510045879407{margin-top: -85px !important;}"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1747592086625{margin-top: 0px !important;}"][rev_slider_vc alias="26-santillane" el_class="revolution"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class="nivel_2"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509921341054{padding-right: 40px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="A Rental Income Apartment Building" font_container="tag:h2|text_align:left|line_height:50px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][vc_column_text css=""]A one of a kind boutique building in the heart of Coral Gables. 26 Santillane is a 4 story building with 15 apartments that was completed in February of 2018, designed by the renowned Coral Gables architectural ﬁrm Bellin & Pratt. The building has 15 two-bedroom / two-bathroom apartments, parking, a GYM and designated storage areas for tenants.
UDI´s original strategy was to turn this building into a full AirBnB property, however, long term rent demand was very high during construction and management had the building fully rented at construction completion.[/vc_column_text][ultimate_spacer height="20" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509844650957{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-top: 75px !important;padding-right: 75px !important;padding-bottom: 75px !important;padding-left: 75px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}" el_class="revolution-sup"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="26 Santillane" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:48|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:57px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="100" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="TYPE OF ASSET: Multi-Family Boutique Rental Building. ADDRESS: 26 Santillane Avenue, Coral Gables. Florida 33134 YEAR BUILT: 2018 UNITS: 15 Units/ 4 levels. item.title: Amsterdam 223
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1510045879407{margin-top: -85px !important;}"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1747591512843{margin-top: 0px !important;}"][rev_slider_vc alias="6507-bella-1-1" el_class="revolution"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class="nivel_2"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509921341054{padding-right: 40px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Residential Building in Mexico City" font_container="tag:h2|text_align:left|line_height:50px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][vc_column_text css=""]La Condesa is the vibrant heart of Mexico City and Amsterdam Street is its main artery, its where over 40 restaurants and bars host a young urban local and foreign market, Amsterdam 223 was our ﬁrst in Mexico City and the statement of our market entry into this sophisticated young market. Weather you invest to rent or to enjoy life here, this Project is a true gem.

item.content:encoded:
[vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1510044871338{margin-top: -85px !important;}"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1747591671597{margin-top: 0px !important;}"][rev_slider_vc alias="26-santillane-1" el_class="revolution"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class="nivel_2"][vc_column width="2/5" css=".vc_custom_1509920134837{padding-right: 20px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Boutique Building in La Roma" font_container="tag:h2|text_align:left|line_height:50px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][vc_column_text css=""]Investment Highlights: ▪ Strong rental income potential in a booming hospitality and residential district ▪ Consistent occupancy rates driven by tourism and remote work trends ▪ Ideal for investors seeking passive income and capital appreciation ▪ Plug-and-play opportunity in a globally trending neighborhood
This boutique asset is a rare chance to enter the Roma Norte market with a turnkey, income-generating property that offers both lifestyle appeal and financial performance.[/vc_column_text][ultimate_spacer height="20" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column][vc_column width="3/5"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509844650957{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-top: 75px !important;padding-right: 75px !important;padding-bottom: 75px !important;padding-left: 75px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}" el_class="revolution-sup"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="Querétaro 37" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:48|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:57px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="100" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Premium Investment Opportunity – Boutique Rental Building in Roma Norte, Mexico City Asset Type: Rental Income Boutique Building Location: Roma Norte, Mexico City Year Built: 2024 | Total Units: 23 | Levels: 6 Building Size: 3,200 m²
Position your portfolio at the heart of one of Latin America’s most dynamic real estate markets with this brand-new boutique rental building in Roma Norte, one of Mexico City’s most sought-after neighborhoods.
Prime Location Highlights: ▫ In the cultural and culinary heart of Roma Norte ▫ Surrounded by art galleries, restaurants, cafés, and vibrant nightlife ▫ High demand from young professionals, digital nomads, and expats ▫ Strong Airbnb and mid-term rental market performance
Property Features: ▫ 23 modern, fully equipped rental units ▫ 6-level boutique design focused on comfort and aesthetics ▫ High-quality construction (2024) with low maintenance requirements ▫ Optimized for short-term, mid-term, or long-term rental strategies" font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:26px" use_theme_fonts="yes" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][dt_portfolio number="499" posts_per_page="499" type="grid" same_width="true" proportion="425x365" content_aligment="center" show_title="true" show_details="true"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

Invest in location. Invest in lifestyle. Invest in long-term value. Contact us for detailed investment packages and availability.[/vc_column_text][ultimate_spacer height="20" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509844650957{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-top: 75px !important;padding-right: 75px !important;padding-bottom: 75px !important;padding-left: 75px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}" el_class="revolution-sup"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="701 Valencia" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:48|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:57px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="100" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Luxury Residential Investment Opportunity Prime Location | Coral Gables | Delivery Q2 2025
Introducing 701 Valencia, an exclusive luxury residential building located in the heart of Coral Gables, one of South Florida’s most desirable and affluent neighborhoods. This investment opportunity features premium rental-only units in a high-demand, supply-constrained market.
▫ Asset Type: Luxury Residential (Rentals Only) ▫ Units: 25 High-End Residences ▫ Rental Range: $7,500 – $10,500 / month ▫ Estimated Delivery: Q2 2025
World-Class Amenities:
Rooftop Lounge with sweeping Coral Gables views
Rooftop Terrace for social and private events
Fully equipped Fitness Center
Business Center & Private Offices
Unparalleled skyline views" font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:26px" use_theme_fonts="yes" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][dt_portfolio number="999" posts_per_page="99" type="grid" same_width="true" proportion="425x365" content_aligment="center" show_title="true" show_details="true"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: United Developers
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
Esto es una página de ejemplo. Es diferente a una entrada porque permanece fija en un lugar y se mostrará en la navegación de tu sitio (en la mayoría de los temas). La mayoría de la gente empieza con una página de Acerca de, que les presenta a los potenciales visitantes del sitio. Podría ser algo como esto:
¡Hola! Soy mensajero por el día, aspirante a actor por la noche, y este es mi blog. Vivo en Madrid, tengo un perrazo llamado Duque y me gustan las piñas coladas (y que me pille un chaparrón)
...o algo así:
La empresa XYZ se fundó en 1971 y ha estado ofreciendo "cosas" de calidad al público desde entonces. Situada en Madrid, XYZ emplea a más de 2.000 personas y hace todo tipo de cosas sorprendentes para la comunidad de Madrid.
Si eres nuevo en WordPress deberías ir a tu escritorio para borrar esta página y crear páginas nuevas con tu propio contenido. ¡Pásalo bien!

item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1510044458371{margin-top: -85px !important;}"][vc_column][rev_slider_vc alias="home"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default"][vc_column][vc_row_inner el_class="z-index2" el_id="real-estate"][vc_column_inner el_class=".nivel_2" width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1747593239094{margin-top: -50px !important;padding-right: 80px !important;padding-bottom: 80px !important;padding-left: 80px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="100" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][vc_single_image image="89" img_size="full"][ultimate_spacer height="50"][vc_custom_heading text="United Developers International LLC (UDI) is a Real Estate Development Firm established in Miami Florida in 2002 dedicated to the development of Residential and Rental Income Properties in Florida, Texas and Mexico.

The Principals of UDI, Jose Luis Bueno and Jaime Maussan have extensive experience in Construction, Development and Marketing Real Estate projects in Miami, Houston and Mexico City having raised over 100 million dollars since 2002 for Commercial and Real Estate projects." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner el_class="z-index2"][vc_column_inner width="1/2"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509749096501{margin-top: -400px !important;margin-left: -25px !important;padding-top: 80px !important;padding-right: 80px !important;padding-bottom: 80px !important;padding-left: 80px !important;background-color: #c2c0bc !important;}"][vc_custom_heading text="United Developers Team" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Our team specializes in:

- Feasibility Analysis
- Market research
- Land acquisition
- Engineering, Design and Development
- Construction
- Stabilization
- Property Management
- Marketing
- Brokerage and Sales" font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row anchor="advisors-alliances"][vc_column][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509929664814{padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 20px !important;}" el_id="advisors-alliances"][vc_column_inner width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509780386243{padding-right: 40px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="120"][vc_custom_heading text="Advisors / Alliances" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="UDI and its afﬁliate companies have been developing and investing in the South Florida Real Estate market since 2002 and have established alliances and long time relations with key industry organizations in the Brokerage, Legal, General Contracting and Architectural ﬁrms such as: T&A Builders, Bellin & Pratt, Tom Sherman PA, CDMX HOMES, LGC BUILDERS and Marcus & Millichap, between others.

UDI´s extensive experience in Real Estate goes beyond construction and development. The group was behind the acquisition and introduction of Engel & Volkers in South Florida, our brokerage division managed 350 sales associates, opened 5 real estate ofﬁces and had sales of over $330 million dollars during 2014, a year before the company was successfully sold to a local Real Estate company. Engel & Volkers Miami, www.engelandvoelkers.com is the subsidiary of the leading Real Estate Brokerage ﬁrm in Europe with over 700 ofﬁces and more than 12,000 sales agents in more than 40 countries. This global sales network is used to promote UDI´s properties during the construction stage in order to have closings soon after the buildings have been stabilized." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="0" height_on_tabs="0" height_on_tabs_portrait="0" height_on_mob_landscape="50" height_on_mob="50"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/4" css=".vc_custom_1744010063015{margin-right: -10px !important;padding-left: 20px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="150" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][vc_single_image image="135" img_size="large" alignment="center"][ultimate_spacer height="80" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][vc_single_image image="130" img_size="large" alignment="center"][ultimate_spacer height="80" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][vc_single_image image="9034" img_size="large" alignment="center" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="80" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/4" css=".vc_custom_1744010071595{margin-left: -10px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}"][vc_single_image image="9033" img_size="180x180" alignment="right" css="" el_class="cdmx" el_id="cdmx"][vc_single_image image="150" img_size="large" alignment="center"][ultimate_spacer height="130" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][vc_single_image image="144" img_size="large" alignment="center"][ultimate_spacer height="119" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][ultimate_spacer height="80" height_on_mob_landscape="50" height_on_mob="50"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row]

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:9:"WordPress";s:11:"policy_text";s:4993:"

Quiénes somos

Texto sugerido: La dirección de nuestra web es: https:https:https://udevelopers.com/new.

Comentarios

Texto sugerido: Cuando los visitantes dejan comentarios en la web, recopilamos los datos que se muestran en el formulario de comentarios, así como la dirección IP del visitante y la cadena de agentes de usuario del navegador para ayudar a la detección de spam.

Una cadena anónima creada a partir de tu dirección de correo electrónico (también llamada hash) puede ser proporcionada al servicio de Gravatar para ver si la estás usando. La política de privacidad del servicio Gravatar está disponible aquí: https://automattic.com/privacy/. Después de la aprobación de tu comentario, la imagen de tu perfil es visible para el público en el contexto de tu comentario.

Medios

Texto sugerido: Si subes imágenes a la web, deberías evitar subir imágenes con datos de ubicación (GPS EXIF) incluidos. Los visitantes de la web pueden descargar y extraer cualquier dato de ubicación de las imágenes de la web.

Cookies

Texto sugerido: Si dejas un comentario en nuestro sitio puedes elegir guardar tu nombre, dirección de correo electrónico y web en cookies. Esto es para tu comodidad, para que no tengas que volver a rellenar tus datos cuando dejes otro comentario. Estas cookies tendrán una duración de un año.

Si tienes una cuenta y te conectas a este sitio, instalaremos una cookie temporal para determinar si tu navegador acepta cookies. Esta cookie no contiene datos personales y se elimina al cerrar el navegador.

Cuando accedas, también instalaremos varias cookies para guardar tu información de acceso y tus opciones de visualización de pantalla. Las cookies de acceso duran dos días, y las cookies de opciones de pantalla duran un año. Si seleccionas «Recuérdarme», tu acceso perdurará durante dos semanas. Si sales de tu cuenta, las cookies de acceso se eliminarán.

Si editas o publicas un artículo se guardará una cookie adicional en tu navegador. Esta cookie no incluye datos personales y simplemente indica el ID del artículo que acabas de editar. Caduca después de 1 día.

Contenido incrustado de otros sitios web

Texto sugerido: Los artículos de este sitio pueden incluir contenido incrustado (por ejemplo, vídeos, imágenes, artículos, etc.). El contenido incrustado de otras webs se comporta exactamente de la misma manera que si el visitante hubiera visitado la otra web.

Estas web pueden recopilar datos sobre ti, utilizar cookies, incrustar un seguimiento adicional de terceros, y supervisar tu interacción con ese contenido incrustado, incluido el seguimiento de tu interacción con el contenido incrustado si tienes una cuenta y estás conectado a esa web.

Con quién compartimos tus datos

Texto sugerido: Si solicitas un restablecimiento de contraseña, tu dirección IP será incluida en el correo electrónico de restablecimiento.

Cuánto tiempo conservamos tus datos

Texto sugerido: Si dejas un comentario, el comentario y sus metadatos se conservan indefinidamente. Esto es para que podamos reconocer y aprobar comentarios sucesivos automáticamente, en lugar de mantenerlos en una cola de moderación.

De los usuarios que se registran en nuestra web (si los hay), también almacenamos la información personal que proporcionan en su perfil de usuario. Todos los usuarios pueden ver, editar o eliminar su información personal en cualquier momento (excepto que no pueden cambiar su nombre de usuario). Los administradores de la web también pueden ver y editar esa información.

Qué derechos tienes sobre tus datos

Texto sugerido: Si tienes una cuenta o has dejado comentarios en esta web, puedes solicitar recibir un archivo de exportación de los datos personales que tenemos sobre ti, incluyendo cualquier dato que nos hayas proporcionado. También puedes solicitar que eliminemos cualquier dato personal que tengamos sobre ti. Esto no incluye ningún dato que estemos obligados a conservar con fines administrativos, legales o de seguridad.

Dónde se envían tus datos

Texto sugerido: Los comentarios de los visitantes puede que los revise un servicio de detección automática de spam.

";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:11:"WooCommerce";s:11:"policy_text";s:4589:"

Este texto de muestra incluye los básicos sobre qué datos personales recopila, almacena y comparte tu tienda, así como quién tiene acceso a esos datos. Dependiendo de qué ajustes estén activos y qué plugins adicionales se use, la información específica compartida por tu tienda puede variar. Te recomendamos que consultes a un abogado para decidir qué información mostrar en tu política de privacidad.

Recopilamos información tuya durante el proceso de pago en nuestra tienda.

Lo que recopilamos y almacenamos

Mientras visitas nuestro sitio realizaremos el seguimiento de:

  • Productos que has visto: Los usaremos para, por ejemplo, mostrarte los productos que has visto recientemente
  • Ubicación, dirección IP y tipo de navegador: usaremos esto para propósitos como estimar impuestos y costes de envío
  • Dirección de envío: te pediremos que facilites esto para que podamos, por ejemplo, estimar el coste del envío antes de que hagas un pedido, ¡y enviarte el pedido!

También usamos cookies para realizar el seguimiento de los contenidos del carrito mientras navegas por nuestro sitio.

Observación: puede que quieras detallar tu política de cookies, y enlazar desde aquí a esta sección.

Cuando nos compras algo te pedimos que facilites información que incluye tu nombre, dirección de facturación, dirección de envío, dirección de correo electrónico, número de teléfono, detalles de la tarjeta de crédito/pago e información adicional opcional como el nombre de usuario y la contraseña. Usaremos esta información para propósitos como:

  • Enviarte información sobre tu cuenta y pedido
  • Responder a tus solicitudes, incluidos reembolsos y reclamaciones
  • Procesar pagos y evitar el fraude
  • Configurar tu cuenta para nuestra tienda
  • Cumplir con cualquier obligación legal que tengamos, como cálculos de impuestos
  • Mejorar las ofertas de nuestra tienda
  • Enviarte mensajes promocionales, si eliges recibirlos

Si creas una cuenta almacenaremos tu nombre, dirección, correo electrónico y número de teléfono, lo que usaremos para el proceso de pago y futuros pedidos.

Normalmente almacenamos información sobre ti durante el tiempo que necesitemos la información para los propósitos para los que la recopilamos y usamos, y no estemos legalmente obligados a seguir guardándola. Por ejemplo, almacenaremos información de los pedidos durante XXX años para propósitos de impuestos y contabilidad. Esto incluye tu nombre, dirección de correo electrónico y direcciones de facturación y envío.

También almacenamos comentarios o valoraciones, si eliges dejarlos.

Quién de nuestro equipo tiene acceso

Los miembros de nuestro equipo tienen acceso a la información que nos ofreces. Por ejemplo, los administradores y gestores de tienda pueden acceder:

  • La información de pedidos, como qué se compró, cuándo se compró y dónde se debería enviar, y
  • La información de cliente, como tu nombre, dirección de correo electrónico, y la información de facturación y envío.

Los miembros de nuestro equipo tienen acceso a esta información para ayudar a completar pedidos, procesar reembolsos y darte soporte.

Lo que compartimos con otros

En esta sección deberías apuntar con quién estás compartiendo datos, y con qué objetivo. Esto podría incluir, pero no está solo limitado a ello, análisis, marketing, pasarelas de pago, proveedores de envío, e incrustados de terceros.

Compartimos información con otros, que nos ayudan a ofrecer nuestros pedidos y gestionar servicios para ti; por ejemplo --

Pagos

En esta subsección deberías apuntar qué otros procesadores de pago externos estás usando para admitir pagos en tu tienda, ya que puede que manejen datos de los clientes. Hemos incluido PayPal como ejemplo, pero deberías borrarlo si no estás usando PayPal.

Aceptamos pagos mediante PayPal. Al procesar pagos algunos de tus datos se pasarán a PayPal, incluida la información requerida para procesar o dar soporte al pago, tales como el total de la compra y la información de facturación.

Por favor, revisa la política de privacidad de PayPal para más detalles.

";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:16:"Burst Statistics";s:11:"policy_text";s:445:"

Este sitio web usa Burst Statistics, una herramienta de estadísticas que respeta la privacidad, para analizar el comportamiento de los visitantes. Para esta funcionalidad nosotros (este sitio web) recogemos datos anónimos, almacenados localmente, sin compartirlos con otras partes. Para más información, lee la Declaración de Privacidad de Burst.

";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:22:"Really Simple Security";s:11:"policy_text";s:384:"

Really Simple Security y las extensiones de Really Simple Security no procesan ninguna información personal identificable, por lo que el GDPR no se aplica a estos plugins ni al uso de estos plugins en tu sitio web. Puedes encontrar nuestra política de privacidad aquí.

";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:43:"Complianz | The Privacy Suite for WordPress";s:11:"policy_text";s:524:"

Esta web utiliza la Privacy Suite for WordPress de Complianz para recoger y registrar el consentimiento basado en el navegador y en el dispositivo. Para esta funcionalidad, tu dirección IP se anonimiza y se almacena en nuestra base de datos. Este servicio no procesa ninguna información personal identificable y no comparte ningún dato con el proveedor de servicios. Para más información, consulta la declaración de privacidad de Complianz.

";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:8:"WP Smush";s:11:"policy_text";s:1362:"

Plugin: Smush

Nota: Smush no interactúa con los visitantes de tu web. La única opción de datos de entrada que tiene Smush es la suscripción al boletín para los administradores del sitio únicamente. Si quieres notificar a tus usuarios sobre ello en tu política de privacidad, puedes utilizar la siguiente información.

Smush envía imágenes a los servidores de WPMU DEV optimizándolas para su uso en la web. Esto incluye la transferencia de datos EXIF. Los datos EXIF serán eliminados o devueltos tal cual. No serán guardados en los servidores de WPMU DEV.

Smush utiliza la red de distribución de contenido (CDN) de Stackpath. Es posible que Stackpath almacene registros de los visitantes del sitio, incluyendo IPs, UA, referrer, ubicación e ISP durante 7 días. Los ficheros y las imágenes servidas por la CDN pueden estar almacenadas y ser servidas desde países distintos del tuyo. Aquí está la política de privacidad de Stackpath.

Smush usa un servicio externo de correo electrónico (Drip) para enviar correos informativos al administrador del sitio. El correo electrónico del administrador es enviado a Drip y una cookie es establecida para este servicio. Sólo la información del administrador es recopilada por Drip.

";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:7:"Akismet";s:11:"policy_text";s:507:"Recopilamos información sobre los visitantes que comentan en los sitios que usan nuestro servicio anti-spam, Akismet. La información que recopilamos depende de cómo configure Akismet en el sitio el usuario, pero incluye, normalmente, la dirección IP del comentarista, el navegador del usuario, el sitio de referencia y la URL del sitio (además de otra información directamente facilitada por el comentarista, como su nombre, nombre de usuario, dirección de correo electrónico y el mismo comentario).";s:5:"added";i:1741695820;}

a:3:{s:11:"plugin_name";s:17:"Slider Revolution";s:11:"policy_text";s:4380:"

In case you’re using Google Web Fonts (default) or playing videos or sounds via YouTube or Vimeo in Slider Revolution we recommend to add the corresponding text phrase to your privacy police:

YouTube

Our website uses plugins from YouTube, which is operated by Google. The operator of the pages is YouTube LLC, 901 Cherry Ave., San Bruno, CA 94066, USA.

If you visit one of our pages featuring a YouTube plugin, a connection to the YouTube servers is established. Here the YouTube server is informed about which of our pages you have visited.

If you're logged in to your YouTube account, YouTube allows you to associate your browsing behavior directly with your personal profile. You can prevent this by logging out of your YouTube account.

YouTube is used to help make our website appealing. This constitutes a justified interest pursuant to Art. 6 (1) (f) DSGVO.

Further information about handling user data, can be found in the data protection declaration of YouTube under https://www.google.de/intl/de/policies/privacy.

Vimeo

Our website uses features provided by the Vimeo video portal. This service is provided by Vimeo Inc., 555 West 18th Street, New York, New York 10011, USA.

If you visit one of our pages featuring a Vimeo plugin, a connection to the Vimeo servers is established. Here the Vimeo server is informed about which of our pages you have visited. In addition, Vimeo will receive your IP address. This also applies if you are not logged in to Vimeo when you visit our plugin or do not have a Vimeo account. The information is transmitted to a Vimeo server in the US, where it is stored.

If you are logged in to your Vimeo account, Vimeo allows you to associate your browsing behavior directly with your personal profile. You can prevent this by logging out of your Vimeo account.

For more information on how to handle user data, please refer to the Vimeo Privacy Policy at https://vimeo.com/privacy.

Google Web Fonts

For uniform representation of fonts, this page uses web fonts provided by Google. When you open a page, your browser loads the required web fonts into your browser cache to display texts and fonts correctly.

For this purpose your browser has to establish a direct connection to Google servers. Google thus becomes aware that our web page was accessed via your IP address. The use of Google Web fonts is done in the interest of a uniform and attractive presentation of our plugin. This constitutes a justified interest pursuant to Art. 6 (1) (f) DSGVO.

If your browser does not support web fonts, a standard font is used by your computer.

Further information about handling user data, can be found at https://developers.google.com/fonts/faq and in Google's privacy policy at https://www.google.com/policies/privacy/.

SoundCloud

On our pages, plugins of the SoundCloud social network (SoundCloud Limited, Berners House, 47-48 Berners Street, London W1T 3NF, UK) may be integrated. The SoundCloud plugins can be recognized by the SoundCloud logo on our site.

When you visit our site, a direct connection between your browser and the SoundCloud server is established via the plugin. This enables SoundCloud to receive information that you have visited our site from your IP address. If you click on the “Like” or “Share” buttons while you are logged into your SoundCloud account, you can link the content of our pages to your SoundCloud profile. This means that SoundCloud can associate visits to our pages with your user account. We would like to point out that, as the provider of these pages, we have no knowledge of the content of the data transmitted or how it will be used by SoundCloud. For more information on SoundCloud’s privacy policy, please go to https://soundcloud.com/pages/privacy.

If you do not want SoundCloud to associate your visit to our site with your SoundCloud account, please log out of your SoundCloud account.

item.title: Política de devoluciones y reembolsos
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
This is a sample page.

Overview

Our refund and returns policy lasts 30 days. If 30 days have passed since your purchase, we can’t offer you a full refund or exchange.

To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging.

Several types of goods are exempt from being returned. Perishable goods such as food, flowers, newspapers or magazines cannot be returned. We also do not accept products that are intimate or sanitary goods, hazardous materials, or flammable liquids or gases.

Additional non-returnable items:

  • Gift cards
  • Downloadable software products
  • Some health and personal care items

To complete your return, we require a receipt or proof of purchase.

Please do not send your purchase back to the manufacturer.

There are certain situations where only partial refunds are granted:

  • Book with obvious signs of use
  • CD, DVD, VHS tape, software, video game, cassette tape, or vinyl record that has been opened.
  • Any item not in its original condition, is damaged or missing parts for reasons not due to our error.
  • Any item that is returned more than 30 days after delivery

Refunds

Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item. We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.

If you are approved, then your refund will be processed, and a credit will automatically be applied to your credit card or original method of payment, within a certain amount of days.

Late or missing refunds

If you haven’t received a refund yet, first check your bank account again.

Then contact your credit card company, it may take some time before your refund is officially posted.

Next contact your bank. There is often some processing time before a refund is posted.

If you’ve done all of this and you still have not received your refund yet, please contact us at {email address}.

Sale items

Only regular priced items may be refunded. Sale items cannot be refunded.

Exchanges

We only replace items if they are defective or damaged. If you need to exchange it for the same item, send us an email at {email address} and send your item to: {physical address}.

Gifts

If the item was marked as a gift when purchased and shipped directly to you, you’ll receive a gift credit for the value of your return. Once the returned item is received, a gift certificate will be mailed to you.

If the item wasn’t marked as a gift when purchased, or the gift giver had the order shipped to themselves to give to you later, we will send a refund to the gift giver and they will find out about your return.

Shipping returns

To return your product, you should mail your product to: {physical address}.

You will be responsible for paying for your own shipping costs for returning your item. Shipping costs are non-refundable. If you receive a refund, the cost of return shipping will be deducted from your refund.

Depending on where you live, the time it may take for your exchanged product to reach you may vary.

If you are returning more expensive items, you may consider using a trackable shipping service or purchasing shipping insurance. We don’t guarantee that we will receive your returned item.

Need help?

Contact us at {email} for questions related to refunds and returns.

item.title: REAL ESTATE FUND
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row el_class="nivel_2" anchor="real-estate-found-500"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509931952709{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important;}"][vc_single_image image="132" img_size="full"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509921341054{padding-right: 40px !important;}"][vc_custom_heading text="Real Estate Fund Opportunity" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:30px|text_align:left|line_height:50px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][vc_column_text css=""]UDI is planning to invite a group of Investors to participate in the acquisition of land and construction of 500 apartments and single-family homes in Miami Florida and Houston Texas.
The portfolio will be stabilized and sold soon after completion. Investors will have the option of multiple exit strategies as well as the right to maintain ownership of the assets. Interested parties should contact management for further details.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_single_image image="9476" img_size="full" alignment="center" css=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" disable_element="yes" css=".vc_custom_1744639141530{margin-top: -85px !important;}" el_id="land-inventory"][vc_column][ultimate_spacer height="50"][rev_slider_vc alias="conroe-1" el_class="revolution"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" disable_element="yes" el_class="nivel_2"][vc_column width="1/2"][ultimate_spacer height="250"][ult_buttons btn_title="Contact Us" btn_align="ubtn-right" btn_size="ubtn-custom" btn_width="265" btn_height="55" btn_title_color="#274D60" btn_bg_color="#999999" btn_bg_color_hover="#274D60" btn_title_color_hover="#FFFFFF" icon_size="32" btn_icon_pos="ubtn-sep-icon-at-left" btn_font_size="desktop:24px;" btn_line_height="desktop:25px;"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509844650957{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-top: 75px !important;padding-right: 75px !important;padding-bottom: 75px !important;padding-left: 75px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}" el_class="revolution-sup"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="Land Inventory" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:48|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:57px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="50"][vc_custom_heading text="Under Construction Section. item.title: Privacy policy
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded: Privacy Policy Last updated: November 13th, 2017. United Developers International LLC operates http://www.udevelopers.com. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use and disclosure of Personal Information we receive from users of the Site. We use your Personal Information only for providing and improving the Site. By using the Site, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.   Information Collection And Use While using our Site, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you. Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to your name ("Personal Information").   Log Data Like many site operators, we collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Site ("Log Data"). This Log Data may include information such as your computer's Internet Protocol ("IP") address, browser type, browser version, the pages of our Site that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages and other statistics. Communications We may use your Personal Information to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information. Cookies Cookies are files with small amount of data, which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a web site and stored on your computer's hard drive. Like many sites, we use "cookies" to collect information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Site.   Security The security of your Personal Information is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage, is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.   Changes To This Privacy Policy This Privacy Policy is effective as of November 13th, 2017 and will remain in effect except with respect to any changes in its provisions in the future, which will be in effect immediately after being posted on this page. We reserve the right to update or change our Privacy Policy at any time and you should check this Privacy Policy periodically. Your continued use of the Service after we post any modifications to the Privacy Policy on this page will constitute your acknowledgment of the modifications and your consent to abide and be bound by the modified Privacy Policy. If we make any material changes to this Privacy Policy, we will notify you either through the email address you have provided us, or by placing a prominent notice on our website.   Contact Us If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

item.title: ABOUT US
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner el_id="coral-gables"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4"][vc_custom_heading text="CORAL GABLES" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="South Miami hosts a movie neighborhood, Coral Gables, also called “the City Beautiful,” a place where everything looks perfect: the houses are huge mansions surrounded by meticulous gardens and the streets have no trace of rubbish. Mediterranean style architecture predominates, although in some streets you can find colonial, French or Italian style buildings. The acceleration of the economy, the flow of the labor market, business tourism as well as the typology of people and / or young generation that currently represents the workforce of South Miami has had a huge impact on the real estate sector as it is increasingly recurrent rental housing income in the short and medium term. This movement or redistribution of the population and the Real Estate business has boosted investment in areas such as Coral Gables as a potential investment focus." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="300"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509786477675{background-position: 0 0 !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;}"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4" css=".vc_custom_1509786955962{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;padding-left: 300px !important;background-image: url(http:https:https://udevelopers.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/flyer-1.jpg?id=187) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="300"][vc_custom_heading text="INTERNATIONAL TRADE & ENTERTAINMENT." font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Miami is considered a world city for its importance in the areas of finance, business, international trade and entertainment. In addition to being a tourist and business destination, Miami and cities around have a wide offer in the field of higher education, with emblematic universities, a wide portfolio of tourist activities or entertainment and shopping centers." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="200"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" full_width_row="true" css=".vc_custom_1509836929935{margin-top: -40px !important;}"][vc_column width="3/4"][vc_single_image image="145" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1748858586584{margin-top: -950px !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/4"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1509928373890{margin-top: -40px !important;margin-right: 40px !important;background-color: #f0efee !important;}" el_id="south-florida"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509839000564{margin-left: 40px !important;}"][vc_custom_heading text="SOUTH FLORIDA OFFER" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Coral Gables and Miami are the destiny of world business. A thriving economy, strong business sectors, instant connectivity, broad social and cultural offerings and an active and vibrant residential community come together to create a cosmopolitan city. Companies strategically choose Miami as part of the city’s core: A tropical paradise on the coast where worlds meet, entrepreneurs meet, and the Americas unite.
One of the indicators that show Coral Gables’ active economy are the statistics of high-end real estate, since the city has the highest concentration of offices and a growing demand for retail business premises, which consolidates it as a world-wide purchase destination." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded: [vc_row type="vc_default" el_class="nivel_2" anchor="land-inventory" css=".vc_custom_1510046269781{margin-top: -85px !important;}"][vc_column width="2/3" css=".vc_custom_1509921341054{padding-right: 40px !important;}"][vc_single_image image="368" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1509931532480{margin-top: 20px !important;margin-right: -200px !important;margin-bottom: 20px !important;margin-left: 20px !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/3"][ultimate_spacer height="300"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1510046331602{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;padding-left: 40px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}" el_class="revolution-sup" el_id="211-santillane"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="211 Santillane" font_container="tag:h2|font_size:30px|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:36px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][vc_custom_heading text="UDI is raising $9.2 million dollars to be invested as equity in a 69 apartment building construction project. Interested parties should contact our management team for further details." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:26px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][ultimate_spacer height="50"][vc_btn title="Download PDF" style="custom" custom_background="" custom_text="#335264" shape="square" size="lg" align="center" button_block="true" link="url:OFFERING%20211%20Santillane_UNITED_DEVELOPERS_Rev%2010-08-2019%20(Full%20Doc).pdf|title:%2F%23||" css=".vc_custom_1533910132360{border-top-width: 3px !important;border-right-width: 3px !important;border-bottom-width: 3px !important;border-left-width: 3px !important;background-color: #c2c0bc !important;border-left-color: #000000 !important;border-left-style: solid !important;border-right-color: #000000 !important;border-right-style: solid !important;border-top-color: #000000 !important;border-top-style: solid !important;border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;border-bottom-style: solid !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="200"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class="nivel_2" anchor="real-estate-found-500"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509931952709{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important;}"][vc_single_image image="132" img_size="full"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509921341054{padding-right: 40px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="100"][vc_custom_heading text="Real Estate Fund 500 " font_container="tag:h2|text_align:left|line_height:100px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][vc_column_text]UDI is planning to invite a group of Investors to participate in the acquisition of land and construction of 500 rental apartments in Coral Gables Florida. The portfolio will be stabilized and sold soon after completion. Investors will have the option of multiple exit strategies as well as the right to maintain ownership of the assets. Interested parties should contact management for further details.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1509932575110{background-color: #f0efee !important;}"][vc_column][ultimate_spacer height="100"][vc_single_image image="462" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1510046510339{padding-left: 80px !important;}"][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][vc_custom_heading text="Fund to acquire land is established. Coral Gables, Florida." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:center|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][vc_custom_heading text="UDI begins Road Show to raise $20 million with key acquisition parameters approved by investors." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:center|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][vc_custom_heading text="UDI acquires Land parcels that meet criteria, Incorporates SPV’s and initiates market research for product design and budgeting." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:center|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][vc_custom_heading text="UDI begins project development in the properties, Financing, Architectural and Construction begins, supervises team and vendors. " font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:center|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][vc_custom_heading text="Once each building is finished and stabilized, UDI markets the properties with CAP rates above 4.2 - 4.5%. After each sale, UDI pays back its investors." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:center|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][ultimate_spacer height="150"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1510694025477{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important;}" el_id="land-inventory"][vc_column][rev_slider_vc alias="investment-opportunities"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class="revolution-sup"][vc_column width="1/2"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509935722065{margin-top: -150px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important;background-color: #335264 !important;}"][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text="UDI is raising $9.2 million dollars to be invested as equity in a 69 apartment building construction project. Interested parties should contact our management team for further details." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff|line_height:26px" use_theme_fonts="yes"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: MEXICO CITY
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner el_id="coral-gables"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4" offset="vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"][vc_custom_heading text="MEXICO CITY" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="La Condesa remains the most expensive neighborhood to rent in Mexico City, with prices reaching $ 16 USD per square meter. A 300-square-meter apartment can cost around $ 4916 USD per month, making it a prime location for high-end rentals.
With an impressive 9.5% annual return, La Condesa ranks as the most proﬁtable area for real estate investors, driven by strong demand from locals and expatriates. The neighborhood’s vibrant lifestyle, rich history, and iconic Art Deco architecture continue to attract a diverse mix of professionals, artists, and digital nomads.
The growing presence of foreign renters earning in dollars and euros has fueled rising rental prices and ongoing gentriﬁcation debates, reshaping the local community while reinforcing La Condesa’s position as a top-tier investment hotspot." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4" offset="vc_hidden-lg vc_hidden-md"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="La Condesa remains the most expensive neighborhood to rent in Mexico City, with prices reaching $ 16 USD per square meter. A 300-square-meter apartment can cost around $ 4916 USD per month, making it a prime location for high-end rentals.
With an impressive 9.5% annual return, La Condesa ranks as the most proﬁtable area for real estate investors, driven by strong demand from locals and expatriates. The neighborhood’s vibrant lifestyle, rich history, and iconic Art Deco architecture continue to attract a diverse mix of professionals, artists, and digital nomads.
The growing presence of foreign renters earning in dollars and euros has fueled rising rental prices and ongoing gentriﬁcation debates, reshaping the local community while reinforcing La Condesa’s position as a top-tier investment hotspot." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509786477675{background-position: 0 0 !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;}"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4" css=".vc_custom_1741738359184{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;padding-left: 300px !important;background-image: url(https:https:https://udevelopers.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/fondo-mexicos.jpg?id=9096) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][vc_custom_heading text="INTERNATIONAL TRADE & ENTERTAINMENT." font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Mexico City is recognized as a global metropolis for its prominence in international trade, culture, and entertainment. In addition to being a thriving hub for business and diplomacy, the city offers an unparalleled range of attractions. From its iconic historic center and world-class museums to a dynamic culinary and nightlife scene, Mexico City seamlessly blends tradition with modernity. The city is also home to prestigious universities and research institutions, making it a center for education and innovation, while its vibrant entertainment options and shopping districts draw visitors and professionals from around the world." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="200" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" full_width_row="true" css=".vc_custom_1741737779178{margin-top: -140px !important;}"][vc_column width="3/4"][vc_single_image image="9089" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1741740449259{margin-top: -1100px !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/4"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1747896345215{margin-top: -40px !important;margin-right: -15px !important;margin-bottom: 44px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important;background-color: #f0efee !important;}" el_id="south-florida"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1747896149169{margin-left: 40px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;}" offset="vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"][vc_custom_heading text="MEXICO CITY OFFER" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Mexico City is a thriving hub for international commerce and culture, blending its rich history with modern innovation. As the political and economic heart of Mexico, the city offers unparalleled connectivity, a diverse business ecosystem, and a vibrant lifestyle that attracts talent and investment from around the world.
Renowned as a gateway to Latin America, Mexico City is a strategic choice for global companies seeking to expand their reach. Its dynamic markets, innovative industries, and cultural depth create a unique environment where tradition meets progress.
A testament to Mexico City’s economic strength is its booming real estate sector. With a growing number of corporate ofﬁces and increasing demand for high-end retail and commercial spaces, the city solidiﬁes its role as a premier destination for global business and investment opportunities." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" item.title: HOUSTON
item.dc:creator: U developers
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row type="vc_default" full_width_row="true" css=".vc_custom_1741737779178{margin-top: -140px !important;}"][vc_column offset="vc_hidden-lg vc_hidden-md"][vc_single_image image="9132" img_size="full" css=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner el_id="coral-gables"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4"][ultimate_spacer height="50" height_on_mob_landscape="0" height_on_mob="0"][vc_custom_heading text="HOUSTON" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Houston’s booming economy, driven by energy, healthcare, and aerospace industries, has spurred signiﬁcant growth in the real estate market. The city attracts a dynamic workforce, including young professionals and entrepreneurs, which has ampliﬁed demand for rental properties in both short- and medium-term capacities. Additionally, Houston’s business-friendly environment, affordable cost of living, and strong infrastructure make it an ideal location for long-term investments. Investors beneﬁt from
steady property appreciation and high rental yields, ensuring a secure and proﬁtable market. The city also boasts a well-developed transportation network, including major highways, a reliable public transit system, and one of the busiest airports in the country, making it highly accessible for businesses and residents alike.
Furthermore, Houston offers a wealth of amenities such as world-class healthcare, renowned educational institutions, and diverse cultural and recreational opportunities, enhancing its appeal as a top investment destination." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1741776046094{margin-right: 80px !important;background-position: 0 0 !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;}"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4" css=".vc_custom_1747986002514{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;padding-left: 200px !important;background-image: url(https:https:https://udevelopers.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Fondo-1.png?id=9136) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}" offset="vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][vc_custom_heading text="INTERNATIONAL TRADE & ENTERTAINMENT." font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Houston is widely regarded as a global city due to its signiﬁcant role in international trade, energy, and entertainment. Beyond its reputation as a hub for business and innovation, Houston offers a diverse array of
attractions, making it a destination for both professionals and tourists. The city boasts world-renowned cultural institutions, a vibrant culinary scene, and premier shopping districts. Additionally, Houston is home to top-tier universities and research centers, further enhancing its appeal as a center for education, entertainment, and global commerce." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="200" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1747986046404{margin-right: 0px !important;margin-left: 0px !important;background-position: 0 0 !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;}"][vc_column_inner css=".vc_custom_1747986683042{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 20px !important;background-image: url(https:https:https://udevelopers.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Fondo-1.png?id=9136) !important;}" offset="vc_hidden-lg vc_hidden-md"][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][vc_custom_heading text="INTERNATIONAL TRADE & ENTERTAINMENT." font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Houston is widely regarded as a global city due to its signiﬁcant role in international trade, energy, and entertainment. Beyond its reputation as a hub for business and innovation, Houston offers a diverse array of
attractions, making it a destination for both professionals and tourists. The city boasts world-renowned cultural institutions, a vibrant culinary scene, and premier shopping districts. Additionally, Houston is home to top-tier universities and research centers, further enhancing its appeal as a center for education, entertainment, and global commerce." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="200" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" full_width_row="true" css=".vc_custom_1741737779178{margin-top: -140px !important;}"][vc_column width="3/4" offset="vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"][vc_single_image image="9132" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1741776683391{margin-top: -1100px !important;margin-bottom: -20px !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/4"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="1/2"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" css=".vc_custom_1741741994270{margin-top: -40px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;padding-left: 20px !important;}"][vc_column_inner css=".vc_custom_1509838232024{margin-left: -20px !important;padding-right: 40px !important;background-color: #f0efee !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="HOUSTON OFFER" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][vc_custom_heading text="Houston stands as a global hub for business and innovation. A robust economy, diverse industrial sectors, seamless connectivity, rich cultural and recreational offerings, and an engaged residential community converge to make Houston a truly cosmopolitan city.

Companies from around the globe strategically choose Houston as a key player in their operations: a dynamic metropolis where innovation thrives, international trade ﬂourishes, and the world’s energy capital meets unparalleled opportunity.

A clear indicator of Houston’s economic vitality is the strength of its real estate market. The city boasts a high concentration of corporate ofﬁces and an ever-growing demand for retail and commercial spaces, solidifying its position as a premier destination for global business and investment." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="200" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1744008547174{background-color: #274D60 !important;}"][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][vc_single_image image="9134" img_size="large" alignment="center" css=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="2/3"][vc_custom_heading text="52,816 households moved to Texas" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23FFFFFF|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][vc_custom_heading text="Texas has experienced a strong migration ﬂow.

[vc_row][vc_column][vc_row_inner el_id="coral-gables"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4"][vc_custom_heading text="MIAMI" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Miami stands as a dynamic and ever-evolving city, known for its stunning waterfront views, diverse architecture, and vibrant cultural scene. From luxury high-rises in Brickell to the historic charm of Coconut Grove and the artistic energy of Wynwood, the city offers a unique blend of modern sophistication and tropical allure.
The rapid economic growth, expanding job market, and inﬂux of young professionals and international investors have signiﬁcantly shaped Miami’s real estate sector. With a high demand for both short-term and long-term rentals, the city continues to attract individuals seeking a prime location to live, work, and invest.
This ongoing transformation has fueled real estate development across key neighborhoods, positioning Miami as a global hotspot for residential and commercial investment." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="300" height_on_mob_landscape="30" height_on_mob="30"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner css=".vc_custom_1509786477675{background-position: 0 0 !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;}"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="3/4" css=".vc_custom_1744006570954{padding-top: 40px !important;padding-right: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;padding-left: 300px !important;background-image: url(https:https:https://udevelopers.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/flyer-1.jpg?id=187) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="200" height_on_mob_landscape="20" height_on_mob="20"][vc_custom_heading text="INTERNATIONAL TRADE & ENTERTAINMENT." font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Miami is considered a world city for its importance in the areas of ﬁnance, business, international trade and entertaintment.
In addition to being a tourist and business destination, Miami and cities around have a wide offer in the ﬁeld of higher education, with emblematic universities, a wide portfolio of tourist activities or entertainment and shopping centers." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="100"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" full_width_row="true" css=".vc_custom_1741737779178{margin-top: -140px !important;}"][vc_column width="3/4"][vc_single_image image="9505" img_size="full" css=".vc_custom_1744006583358{margin-top: -800px !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/4"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="vc_default" css=".vc_custom_1744005129753{margin-top: -40px !important;margin-right: 40px !important;background-color: #E9E9E7 !important;}" el_id="miami"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1509839000564{margin-left: 40px !important;}"][ultimate_spacer height="0" height_on_tabs="0" height_on_tabs_portrait="0" height_on_mob_landscape="40" height_on_mob="40"][vc_custom_heading text="MIAMI OFFER" font_container="tag:div|font_size:19px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:30px" google_fonts="font_family:Montserrat%3Aregular%2C700|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=""][ultimate_spacer height="20"][vc_custom_heading text="Miami is the destiny of world business. A thriving economy, strong business sectors, instant connectivity, broad social and cultural offerings and an active and vibrant residential community come together to create a cosmopolitan city.
Companies strategically choose Miami as part of the city’s core: A tropical paradise on the coast where worlds meet, entrepreneurs meet, and the Americas unite.
One of the indicators that show Coral Gables’ active economy are the statistics of high-end real estate, since the city has the highest concentration of ofﬁces and a growing demand for retail business premises, wich consolidates it as a world-wide purchase destination." font_container="tag:div|font_size:14px|text_align:left|color:%23335264|line_height:25px" item.content:encoded:
Ulasan Detail Dunia Slot dan Togel Modern

{Togel online kini jadi primadona di kalangan pemainPermainan kasino online juga semakin diminati} di era digital. Artikel ini akan membahas hal menarik secara netral, sehingga pembaca bisa memahami peluang dan strategi.

Dasar-Dasar Permainan Togel dan Slot Modern

Togel adalah bentuk permainan probabilitas yang sudah ada sejak lama dan kini hadir dalam aplikasi modern. Sedangkan game slot digital adalah permainan simbol yang hasilnya ditentukan oleh generator angka acak. Kedua jenis permainan ini kini tersedia di platform online dengan sistem yang terverifikasi, sehingga hasilnya adil.

Dari Tradisional ke Digital

Permainan angka telah ada sejak lama. Awalnya, pemain harus mengisi tiket kertas untuk ikut bermain. Hasil diumumkan secara manual.

Seiring berkembangnya era digital, togel dan slot mulai masuk ke dunia aplikasi. Kini, semua user dapat mengikuti pasaran hanya dengan tablet. Transformasi ini membuat demam slot meledak di seluruh dunia.

Tren Togel dan Slot 2025

Masa kini menghadirkan sistem modern untuk togel dan slot. Pasaran resmi semakin lengkap, mulai dari togel SGP hingga versi eksklusif.

Situs modern menyediakan cashback, sehingga pemain dapat hemat dana. notifikasi otomatis membuat pengalaman bermain menyenangkan. Tidak heran jumlah pemain meningkat.

Cara Analisa Keluaran Togel

Rahasia terbesar togel ada pada pola angka. Banyak komunitas prediksi percaya bahwa rekap result bisa menjadi dasar. Misalnya: melihat tren bulanan.

Ada juga kalkulasi peluang yang dipakai untuk menemukan angka hoki. Walaupun tidak bisa dipastikan, analisis ini lumayan efektif.

Teknik Analisis Slot Online

Game slot virtual menggunakan sistem probabilitas untuk menentukan hasil. Pemain harus memahami volatilitas untuk mendapatkan persiapan bankroll.

Beberapa aspek penting:

Pemahaman ini bersifat edukatif dan membantu pembaca memahami sistem slot digital secara cermat.

Strategi Kontrol Uang

Kesalahan pemain baru adalah taruhan tanpa kontrol. Modal harus dikelola bijak. Beberapa tips:

Dengan pengelolaan bankroll yang baik, pengalaman slot menjadi lebih aman.

Cara Sukses Togel & Slot Modern
